title: Doctrine Genealogy Date Block v1
$comment: draft, non-authorizing, owner decisions D1-D10 apply

x-governance.provenance_note: Created 2026-07-06 by Codex as PR-3, transcribing Kernel A4 date discipline.
x-governance.reason_for_inclusion: Shared date block required for formulation, assessment, instrument binding-scope, agent, controversy, and timeline event schemas.

date_earliest.description: Earliest plausible year. Null is allowed only when a validator or reviewer confirms the date is not yet knowable.

date_latest.description: Latest plausible year. Null is allowed only when a validator or reviewer confirms the date is not yet knowable.

date_basis.description: Cited basis for the date range; never inferred from presentation order.
